holdings.n: Morgan Stanley Institutional Liquidity Treasury Portfolio Institutional Class

overview.description: The UVA Unconstrained Medium-Term Fixed Income ETF (FFIU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of a broad array of fixed income securities with dollar-weighted average effective duration between three and seven years. FFIU was launched on Aug 21, 2017 and is issued by UVA.
